label: Brainstorm
description: Collaborative document editor that iterates with you on a working copy

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Apply targeted search/replace edits to the document. Use this for focused changes to specific sections.

path.description: Use "document" — the system routes to the working copy automatically

search.description: Exact text to find (must match exactly, including whitespace)

edits.description: Array of search/replace operations to apply sequentially

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Replace the entire document content. Use this for major rewrites or restructuring.

path.description: Use "document" — the system routes to the working copy automatically

tools.name: ask_user
tools.description: Ask the user a clarifying question, optionally with selectable options

question.description: The question to ask the user

options.description: Optional list of selectable options for the user

tools.name: search_registry
tools.description: Search the Prompd package registry for templates and components to reference or inherit from

tools.name: list_package_files
tools.description: List all files in a registry package (useful for exploring base templates)

tools.name: read_package_file
tools.description: Read a specific file from a registry package (useful for resolving inherited templates)

file_path.description: Path to the file within the package

tools.name: get_document_errors
tools.description: Get current validation errors and warnings from the document with line numbers and severity

auto.label: Auto
auto.description: All edits apply directly to the working copy

followUpStrategies.clear: Understand the user's intent and make targeted edits to the document
followUpStrategies.vague: Ask a clarifying question using ask_user to understand what the user wants to change
followUpStrategies.error: Explain the issue and suggest an alternative approach
followUpStrategies.rejected: Acknowledge and propose a different approach to the edit
